sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67745" key="mikropoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-ποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n67745.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lower the tone of</tr_> writing, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
